title: Happy Farm Friends
description: A fun farm scene coloring page featuring friendly farm animals in their natural environment. This coloring activity helps children learn about farm animals while developing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color the farm animals and their surroundings using your favorite colors. Try to use realistic colors for the animals if you can, or be creative with your own special colors!

content.image: A cheerful farm scene with a red barn in the background, a smiling sun in the sky, and several farm animals in the foreground. The animals include a cow, a pig, a horse, a sheep, some chickens, and a friendly farmer. All elements have thick, bold outlines perfect for young colorists.
learningFacts: Cows give us milk, which we can drink or use to make cheese and butter
Sheep's wool is used to make warm clothes like sweaters
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat
Horses help farmers with work around the farm
